text_block.headline: WELCOME TO THE MALDIVES
text_block.body:
Make the most of your Maldives visit by staying at Red Panda Resort. Experience the breathtaking beauty of islands and enjoy world class pampering that Red Panda Resort supplies.

Whether traveling as a couple, alone, or with others, Compass offers amenities and to suit everyone. We're excited to have you as a guest and we know your stay will be unforgettable.

card.headline: LAGOON VILLAS ARE AWESOME!
card.body:
Escape to paradise with our luxurious lagoon villas. Nestled over crystal clear waters, our villas offer stunning views of the surrounding turquoise lagoon and vibrant marine life below.

Indulge in the ultimate relaxation as you soak up the sun on your private deck or take a dip in the warm waters right outside your door. Each villa is elegantly designed with modern amenities and spacious interiors, ensuring a comfortable and unforgettable stay.

card.headline: BEACH VILLAS
card.body:
Relax at our beach villas. Situated along the pristine white sand beaches and crystal-clear turquoise waters, our beach villas offer the perfect blend of luxury and comfort.

Each villa features a spacious living area, private terrace with sun loungers, and direct access to the beach. Relax and unwind as you soak up the stunning views of the Indian Ocean and feel the gentle ocean breeze on your skin.

text_and_image.headline: THE VILLAS
text_and_image.body: Escape to paradise, where crystal clear waters, white sandy beaches, and luxurious overwater bungalows await. Indulge in relaxation and adventure in this tropical oasis.

custom_data.teaser: Red Panda Resort’s Beach Villas offer barefoot luxury in the heart of the Maldives.
Experience quiet luxury and oceanfront serenity in your private Overwater Villa at Red Panda Resort.
Experience the pinnacle of luxury with our exclusive 4-day package, featuring premium accommodations and unforgettable adventures.

tabs.title: Beaches
tabs.body: A chain of 1,192 islands in the Indian Ocean, the Maldives is one of the most serene, romantic, and wildly scenic destinations in the world. The islands are clustered into atolls, based on their proximity to coral reefs, and are surrounded by azure-colored lagoons.

tabs.title: Dining
tabs.body: Dining in the Maldives can be a very indulgent experience indeed. Each resort has multiple restaurants concentrating on various types of world cuisine. Not surprisingly, seafood is a prominent fixture. Vegetarians won't go hungry, though!

tabs.title: Attractions
tabs.body: With 1,190 islands scattered across 26 atolls in the Indian Ocean, including close to 200 resort islands and 200 inhabited islands, there are plenty of places to explore in the Maldives. Despite the numerous options, most visitors choose to lounge at their resort, where restaurants, bars, boutiques and activity centers abound.

tabs.title: Amenities
tabs.body: Amenities in hotels can include spas, hot tubs, health clubs, conference facilities, and banqueting rooms. Hotels also often provide complimentary personal items like soap, shampoo, mouthwash, hair dryers, and irons
